channel.title: gitlab on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in gitlab on William Fang

item.title: Gitlab 安装全过程
item.description: 安装 Gitlab ## 安装必需的依赖项 sudo yum install curl policycoreutils-python openssh-server ## 将 SSH 服务设置成开机自启动 systemctl enable sshd ## 启动 SSH 服务 systemctl start sshd ## 邮件通知 sudo yum install postfix sudo systemctl start postfix sudo systemctl enable postfix ## 安装 Gitlab curl https://packages.gitlab.com/install/repositories/gitlab/gitlab-ce/script.rpm.sh | sudo bash sudo
